summary:
Results-oriented Professional with over 5 years of experience in project management and team leadership.
Proven track record of streamlining operations, reducing costs by 15%, and improving client satisfaction
scores. Expert in cross-functional collaboration and agile methodologies.

responsibilities: Led a team of 10 to successfully deliver 5 high-priority software projects ahead of schedule.
Implemented a new automated reporting system that saved the department 20 hours of manual work per week.
Collaborated with executive leadership to define project roadmaps and resource allocation.
Managed a cumulative budget of $2M with 100% adherence to financial constraints.
Optimized supply chain logistics, resulting in a 12% reduction in shipping delays.
Analyzed operational data to identify bottlenecks and proposed solutions adopted company-wide.
Trained 15+ new hires on internal software and compliance protocols.
Facilitated weekly status meetings to ensure alignment between sales and production teams.
